recap: Mexico dominated Ecuador at the Azteca Stadium, with Julián Quiñones and Raúl Jiménez scoring in the first half to secure a 2-0 victory despite a one-hour weather delay and an early post hit by Ecuador's John Yeboah. Hernán Galíndez kept Ecuador in contention with a crucial save on César Montes' header in the 66th minute, but the hosts' defense held firm to prevent any comeback. Arsenal defender Piero Hincapié's red card in stoppage time for an altercation with Santiago Gimenez capped a frustrating night for the Ecuadorians.
